```python
import sys

def shortest_palindrome(s):
    n = len(s)
    rev_s = s[::-1]
    combined = s + '#' + rev_s
    pi = [0] * len(combined)
    for i in range(1, len(combined)):
        j = pi[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and combined[i] != combined[j]:
            j = pi[j - 1]
        if combined[i] == combined[j]:
            j += 1
        pi[i] = j
    longest_prefix = pi[-1]
    return s + s[:longest_prefix][::-1]

def solve():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read().strip()
    print(shortest_palindrome(input))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()
```
